item.title: AbbVie Skyrizi
item.description:
• Summary: AbbVie outlined a defense strategy for its immunology blockbuster Skyrizi (risankizumab) against new competition from J&J. Skyrizi, an IL-23 inhibitor, has been a key growth driver for AbbVie, and the company is positioning it strongly as rivals enter the IL-23 space.
  • MoAs: Skyrizi (risankizumab): Humanized monoclonal antibody that binds to the p19 subunit of interleukin-23 (IL-23) and inhibits IL-23 receptor interaction
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma, Endpoints News

item.title: AstraZeneca FLAP Inhibitor Phase 2 Failure
item.description:
• Summary: AstraZeneca discontinued development of its FLAP inhibitor after the drug failed to meet endpoints in a Phase 2 asthma trial.
  • MoAs: 5-lipoxygenase activating protein inhibitor; reduces leukotriene synthesis
  • Sources: FierceBiotech
